title: Minnesota Disability Examiner Scheduled Salary Rates (MMB MAPE Plan, eff 2025-07-01)
description: Machine-readable Minnesota MAPE salary data for the Disability Examiner classification (class 0871, compensation grid 14G / code 07L, MAPE Unit 214). Gives hourly and annual (× 2080) min/max for three contract windows: 2023-2025 ($50,530–$73,081), the 2025-2027 year-1 step (+1.5%, $51,140–$74,174), and year-2 (+1.75%, $52,039–$75,502), plus a wage-increase history. Source is the MMB class spec + MAPE 2025-2027 contract. The supervisor classification is unconfirmed (no verified MAPE class code).

columns.name: salary_range_<period>.min_hourly
columns.description: Hourly minimum for the contract period.

columns.name: salary_range_<period>.max_hourly
columns.description: Hourly maximum for the contract period.

columns.name: salary_range_<period>.wage_increase_percent
columns.description: Across-the-board wage increase applied at the effective date (1.5% 2025, 1.75% 2026).

source.publisher: Minnesota Management and Budget (MMB) / MAPE; MN DEED Disability Determination Services Division
source.title: MMB MAPE Salary Plan — class 0871 Disability Examiner, MAPE 2025-2027 contract (eff 2025-07-01)

notes: Authoritative for the examiner: class code 0871 and grid 14G confirmed against the MMB class spec, and min/max hourly rates with documented MAPE 2025-27 wage adjustments (+1.5% 2025-07-01, +1.75% 2026-07-01). Annual = hourly × 2080 FTE. Exact intra-grade step count is not exposed (step increases estimated ~3.55%). SUPERVISOR is UNCONFIRMED — no verified MAPE class code; may fall under AFSCME Council 5 or MMA, needs DEED HR confirmation.
